## BaseRating class

Rating component. This component renders a set of elements filled based on the value passed as prop.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export default class BaseRating extends Vue 
```
<b>Extends:</b> Vue

## Properties

|  Property | Modifiers | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  [max](./x-components.baserating.max.md) |  | number | Maximum number of elements to paint. |
|  [value](./x-components.baserating.value.md) |  | number | Numeric value used to calculates the width of the filled elements. |
